nasb.text: And they overcame him because of the blood of the Lamb and because of the word of their testimony, and they did not love their life even when faced with death.

esv.text: And they have conquered him by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of their testimony, for they loved not their lives even unto death.

cnv.text: 弟兄勝過牠，是因著羊羔的血， 也因著自己所見證的道， 他們雖然至死， 也不愛惜自己的性命。

ccb.text: 弟兄们是靠着羔羊的血和自己所见证的道战胜了它，他们甘愿牺牲，视死如归。

csbs.text: 他们藉着羔羊的血，藉着自己所见证的话语而胜过了它， 他们至死也没有爱惜自己的生命。
